overall.description: Gameplay footage from Avatar: Frontiers of Pandora showing a Na'vi character exploring a lush alien jungle. The clip begins with first-person swimming through a river with giant lily pads before transitioning to third-person perspective as the character walks along the mossy shoreline, passing waterfalls and dense vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow jungle river with giant lily pads

events.description: character reaches out with blue hand to touch a large green lily pad, causing it to react

agents.ego_description: swimming through shallow water in first-person perspective, reaching out to touch lily pads with left hand

entered.detail: massive gnarled tree with thick trunk and hanging moss dominating the left bank
giant floating lily pads with green and purple leaves covering the water surface
tall vertical stone cliff covered in dense vegetation forming the background
dense tropical forest canopy with tall trees surrounding the water area

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view of swimming through a shallow jungle river. The camera moves steadily forward through water dotted with giant lily pads, passing a massive twisted tree on the left bank. Sunlight filters through the dense canopy overhead, illuminating the clear water and rocky cliffs in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: mossy jungle riverbank with waterfalls and rock formations

events.description: camera switches from first-person to third-person follow perspective as Na'vi character stands up from water
character approaches and passes a small waterfall cascading down the rock cliff face

agents.ego_description: Na'vi character walking along the mossy shoreline, observing the environment and looking up at the towering trees

entered.detail: small waterfall cascading down the moss-covered rock cliff face
large decaying log lying across the mossy forest floor
natural stone archway formation in the distant cliff wall
large alien ferns and undergrowth lining the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to third-person following a blue Na'vi character exploring the jungle shoreline. The character walks along mossy ground past fallen logs and exotic ferns, approaching a small waterfall cascading down the cliff. The environment features towering rock formations, hanging vines, and tall palm-like trees under bright sunlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous movement that transitions from an immersive swim through a jungle river into a third-person exploration of a lush shoreline. It begins with a first-person perspective gliding through clear, shallow water dotted with giant lily pads and passing a massive twisted tree. As the camera reaches the bank, the perspective shifts to follow a blue Na'vi character stepping onto the mossy ground among exotic ferns and fallen logs. The scene then expands to reveal towering rock formations and hanging vines as the character approaches a small waterfall cascading down a cliff. Finally, the view opens up under bright sunlight, showcasing tall palm-like trees and distant rocky cliffs.
